candidates.why: Primary top-line operating revenue; matches revenue amounts and is the clearest revenue label.
Appears to be an alternative label for total operating revenue with identical figures; kept as fallback for older periods/label changes.

candidates.row_label: Share of income/loss from joint ventures
candidates.why: Equity income from JVs, not core revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; incorrect for REVT.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue; incorrect for REVT.

variables.notes: Revenue is clearly labeled as 'Operating revenue'. 'Total operating income' carries identical figures and is included as a fallback label over time.

candidates.why: Major operating cost but may include both direct and overhead personnel. Possible component of COGS/operating costs but less clearly direct than 'Other operating expenses'.
Broad bucket of operating costs likely to include direct service/operating expenses for this drilling-focused business; best proxy for cost of sales given absence of a dedicated COGS line.
Financing costs, not production costs; should not be used as COGS.
Residual financing adjustment, not operating COGS.
Non-operating, not part of COGS.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement expense line; not appropriate for COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit 'Cost of sales' line is present. Among available operating expense buckets, 'Other operating expenses' is the best single proxy for direct operating/production costs for a drilling company.

candidates.why: A core operating overhead category (personnel), typically part of SG&A; fits SG&A components definition.
Mixed operating cost bucket that may contain both direct operating costs and overhead; partly SG&A but also likely includes COGS-type items, so less clean for SG&A mapping here.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet intangible asset, not an expense; should not be used as SG&A expense component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization expense, which should be excluded from SG&A per instructions (exclude D&A, impairments).

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not a current-period SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A line exists. 'Personnel expenses' is a clear overhead component; 'Other operating expenses' is more mixed and is being used as COGS, so only 'Personnel expenses' is mapped as SG&A component to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Capitalized R&D asset, not current-period expense; does not represent R&D expense in the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment of R&D assets on the balance sheet; not a current-period R&D expense line.

variables.notes: There is no income statement line for R&D expense. Only capitalized R&D assets appear on the balance sheet, which should not be used for XRD. XRD is therefore treated as 0.

candidates.why: Explicit lease-related interest expense; relevant but more specific than the main interest expense line, so used as a secondary priority.
Primary interest expense line capturing financing costs; best candidate for XINT.
Derivative fair value/hedging-related result, not pure interest expense; not ideal as XINT.
Attribution of net income, not an interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; valid as a tertiary/fallback interest expense label.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense line.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense line.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: The main 'Interest Expense' line is used as primary XINT. Lease-related interest expense lines are included as fallbacks in case of label changes or disaggregation over time.

candidates.why: Component of shareholders’ equity but not total equity; using it alone would omit retained earnings and reserves.
Another component of shareholders’ equity but not the total; incomplete for BE by itself.

Represents total equity attributable to owners (given separate Minority Interest/Non-controlling interests lines and a higher 'TOTAL EQUITY' including them). Best match for BE which should exclude minorities.
Includes both owners’ equity and minority interests (slightly higher than 'Total equity'); not appropriate for BE which must exclude minorities.
Technical balancing line, not a substantive equity measure; should not be used.
Balancing adjustment, not the substantive equity value.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line; not the equity measure.
Total assets/ liabilities+equity; not equity alone.

variables.notes: 'Total equity' is interpreted as equity attributable to owners, with minority interests reported separately and included only in 'TOTAL EQUITY'. This matches the requirement that BE exclude non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not the balance sheet amount used in the BE+MIB denominator; less suitable than balance sheet lines.
Same as income statement non-controlling interests; not the desired balance sheet stock variable.
Balance sheet line item for non-controlling interests; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests with same figures; included as fallback for label changes.

variables.notes: Balance sheet non-controlling interest lines are used so MIB captures the stock of minority interest that pairs with BE in the denominator.
